tests.name: Group A — Discovered Guides Indexing
tests.action: Internal links added from parent calculators. GSC indexing attempted.
tests.baseline: All 3: Discovered - currently not indexed, 0 impressions, 0 clicks
tests.correction: Improve guide content quality. Add more internal links from higher-authority indexed pages.

tests.name: Group B — Unknown Pages Discovery
tests.action: Sitemap verified. Internal links added. GSC indexing attempted.
tests.baseline: All 4: URL is unknown to Google
tests.success: >= 2 of 4 discovered or indexed within 14 days
tests.correction: Verify sitemap ping. Check robots.txt. Add more internal links.

tests.name: Group C — Indexed Pages Gaining Impressions
tests.action: Content improvement planned. Internal links documented.
tests.correction: Content improvement needed beyond links. Investigate thin variant cannibalization.

tests.name: Internal Authority Transfer
tests.baseline: Parents indexed but invisible. Thin variants ranking.
tests.success: >= 1 parent calculator gains impressions/position improvement within 28 days
tests.correction: Source pages may need stronger link context. Increase link count. Improve parent content.
